tasks.label: Run Backend Spring Boot
tasks.command: ./mvnw.cmd

tasks.label: Run Backend Spring Boot
tasks.command: Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Web Frontend
tasks.command: Set-Location web; npm run dev

tasks.label: Run Backend Spring Boot Bypass
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Web Frontend Cmd
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run dev

tasks.label: Install Web Dependencies
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd install

tasks.label: Run Web Frontend Dev
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run dev

tasks.label: Create Backend DB
tasks.command: & mysql -uroot -p123456 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS ebike_rental_db CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;"

tasks.label: Run Backend AutoCreate DB
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run "-Dspring-boot.run.arguments=--spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ebike_rental_db?createDatabaseIfNotExist=true"

tasks.label: Run Backend AutoCreate DB v2
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -D"spring-boot.run.arguments=--spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ebike_rental_db?createDatabaseIfNotExist=true"

tasks.label: Run Backend AutoCreate DB v3
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd "-Dspring-boot.run.arguments=--spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ebike_rental_db?createDatabaseIfNotExist=true" spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Backend Env URL
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ebike_rental_db?createDatabaseIfNotExist=true'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Free Port 8080
tasks.command: $pid=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($pid) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Output "Stopped PID $pid on 8080" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8080" }

tasks.label: Free Port 8080 v2
tasks.command: $procId=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($procId) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Output "Stopped process $procId on 8080" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8080" }

tasks.label: Run Backend 8080
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Web Frontend 5173
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run dev -- --port 5173

tasks.label: Run Backend with Neon
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?user=neondb_owner&password=npg_WyitZCd79pIN&sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Backend Neon 8081
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8081'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Bootstrap Neon Schema
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8082'; $env:SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO='create'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Backend Neon 8083 Verify
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8083'; $env:SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO='update'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Restart Frontend Kill 5173
tasks.command: $procId=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($procId) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Output "Stopped process $procId on 5173" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 5173" }

tasks.label: Run Frontend 5173 Neon API
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run dev -- --port 5173

tasks.label: Restart Backend Promote Admin
tasks.command: $procId=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8083 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($procId) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Output "Stopped process $procId on 8083" } ; Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8083'; $env:ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_EMAIL='blisschavez1@gmail.com'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Stop Port 8083
tasks.command: $procId=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8083 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($procId) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Output "Stopped process $procId on 8083" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8083" }

tasks.label: Run Backend Neon Admin Bootstrap
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8083'; $env:SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO='update'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Backend Neon Admin Bootstrap 2
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8083'; $env:SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO='update'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Run Backend Neon Admin Bootstrap 3
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process Bypass -Force; Set-Location backend/ebike; $env:SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE='prod'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL='jdbc:postgresql://ep-royal-paper-a1e31ukk-pooler.ap-southeast-1.aws.neon.tech/ebike_rental?sslmode=require&channelBinding=require'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME='neondb_owner'; $env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD='npg_WyitZCd79pIN'; $env:PORT='8083'; $env:SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO='update'; & .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Verify Backend Compile
tasks.command: Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd -DskipTests compile

tasks.label: Verify Frontend Build
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run build

tasks.label: Recheck Backend Compile
tasks.command: Set-Location backend/ebike; & .\mvnw.cmd -DskipTests compile

tasks.label: Recheck Frontend Build
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run build

tasks.label: Final Frontend Build Check
tasks.command: Set-Location web; & npm.cmd run build
